title: Mylee 100% Pure Acetone (300ml) - Gel Nail Polish Remover – Maximum Strength Professional Soak-Off for UV/LED, Acrylics, Nail Tips & Glue - Made in the UK

features: MAXIMUM STRENGTH FORMULA – The Mylee 100% Pure Acetone is a professional-grade soak-off gel nail polish remover that contains no parabens, sulphates, or mineral oils. It works by rapidly breaking down the gel on the nail surface for a quick, safe, and easy removal process that saves you time and protects your natural nails.

FAST & EFFICIENT NAIL POLISH REMOVAL – Effortlessly strip away old colour to create the perfect blank canvas. Designed to break down even the toughest nail products quickly, this powerful formula saves you valuable time and effort. Perfect for frequent polish changes or quick clean-ups, it leaves your nails completely clean, prepped, and ready for your next flawless manicure.

SALON-QUALITY RESULTS – Mylee provides professionals and nail art enthusiasts with leading manicure and pedicure products. From nail prep and shine to state-of-the-art cleaning equipment, our acetone is made from the highest quality ingredients to achieve the best results for beauty technicians and beginners alike.

MULTI-PURPOSE SOLVENT – This versatile nail care essential effortlessly dissolves and removes nail glue, nail tips, acrylics, and stubborn glitter polishes. An essential part of any manicure kit, it is suitable for a wide variety of enhancements including UV plastic nails, extensions, and professional-grade acrylic systems.

PROUDLY MADE IN THE UK – Manufactured to the highest British safety standards, our formula is 100% Vegan and Cruelty-Free. We recommend applying cuticle oil and hand lotion after use to rehydrate and condition the fingers, ensuring your nails remain healthy and strong between manicures and pedicures.

UK’s #1 AT-HOME GEL NAIL BRAND – Bringing the salon to you since 2014, Mylee transformed at-home beauty with revolutionary gel kits that cure in 60 seconds and last up to 3 weeks. Our pro-grade acetone is the trusted choice for over 1 million customers seeking flawless, salon-worthy results at home.
description: Product Description Mylee 100% Pure Acetone provides quick and easy removal of regular nail polish, gel nail polish, nail glue, nail tips and acrylic nails. It contains no parabens, sulphates, propylene glycol or mineral oil and is suitable for use of professionals and beauty enthusiasts alike. Mylee is a trusted UK brand. Use with confidence knowing that Mylee products are 100% safe and compliant with all UK and EU safety regulations, and are vegan and cruelty free. To remove gel polish, buff the surface of your nails with a nail file, then soak a cotton pad, cotton ball, or Lint Free Wipe with 100% Pure Acetone and place over the gel colour, securing with a foil wrap and leave for for 10 to 15 minutes for fast removal of gel nail polish. KEY FEATURES 100% Pure Acetone Removes soak-off gel, acrylic, nail extensions & tips in minutes No Parabens, Sulphates, Propylene Glycol or Mineral Oil
